summary: App with bank account withdrawal/extraction feature (dollar bank account)

existing_features.title: Create a Dollar Withdrawal page (route: /withdrawal) accessible from the sidebar and/or the Monetization page. The page must display the current USD balance, an input field for the withdrawal amount, a submit button to request a withdrawal, and a transaction history table showing past withdrawals with their amount, date, and status.
Add a navigation link to the Dollar Withdrawal page in the sidebar (desktop) and the bottom navigation bar (mobile), using an appropriate wallet/withdrawal icon and label 'Withdraw'.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a backend data model and logic for a creator dollar bank account, including: storing a USD balance (as a float or integer cents), recording withdrawal transactions (amount, timestamp, status), and exposing methods to get the current balance, request a withdrawal, and list transaction history.
